CONTENT:
Hi David,

I am reaching out to express my interest in the Manual QA Specialist position. Having recently settled down with my Permanent Residency right here in Winnipeg, I am excited to transition fully back into my core expertise of software quality assurance. I came across this opportunity and see it as the perfect environment to both contribute to and learn from a fast-growing organization.

I bring over 4 years of hands-on QA engineering experience across e-commerce web applications, native mobile apps, and ERP systems. I have attached my resume for your review, and I invite you to visit my LinkedIn profile to get a more comprehensive view of my work history and technical background. I would love the chance to discuss how my hands-on testing experience and extreme ownership of product quality can support the engineering team.

Best regards,

R A Indeewara C Gunathilaka

SUBJECT: Emirates - Job Opportunity
CONTENT:
Hello!

We hope you are having a great day and have 2 minutes to consider an opportunity in the vibrant, tax free city of Dubai. We wouldn't want you to miss out on the great Emirate of Dubai, it's weather, its cosmopolitan feel and the many social groups and clubs that we have got going at Emirates Group, so these roles are physically based in our offices in Dubai. We have some very interesting roles available right now within Emirates Group IT for talented Quality Engineering professionals like you. These roles are varied, working with diverse technologies and products, and looking at your profile and skillset, we'd love to have a conversation with you and see where it leads.

We're looking for professionals of all types, from those that are relatively early in their careers trying to forge their interests and sharpen their skills, all the way to those that have been there and done that; who rely on their experience to bring people together at scale to deliver world-class experiences for our customers. But let's face it, there are a multitude of titles used within the Quality paradigm, so if you call yourself a Software Tester, a Test Engineer, a QA Engineer, perhaps a Test Architect even a SDET using tech and tools like JS, Java, Python, WebDriverIO, Cypress, RestAssured, to more recent patterns such as PACT and Contract-Based Testing and not forgetting vendor integrations and stakeholder management, we'd love to hear from you.

 Before this gets too long, some quick facts for you to consider, the job location is in our offices in sunny Dubai, it's a permanent role so comes with great travel benefits and we'd love to get you on board as soon as possible. Should you be interested, please send the latest copy of your CV and your preferred contact details and we'll be happy to share further details with you. Please visit our page https://www.emiratesgroupcareers.com

Noor AlAli
HR Technology and Talent Acquisition

CONVERSATION TITLE: System Consultant - Infor - Western Colombo Sri Lanka
SUBJECT: System Consultant - Infor - Western Colombo Sri Lanka
CONTENT:
Hi Indeewara,

Good day. I came across your profile on LinkedIn. we are currently looking out for a System Consultant at our Western Colombo Srilanka office.

If you are keen to know more about this opportunity, please send an email to (Prashanth.chakilam@infor.com) with your updated CV/ resume and contact details.



System Consultant



Responsibilities

· Monitor Post Go-Live Production EDI data flowing in and out of internal servers on a 24/7 basis for latency and critical failures.

· Troubleshoot issues related to different types of EDI data/ documents handled in Infor and provide timely resolutions to the internal teams via case management tools.

Troubleshoot issues related to Connectivity protocols such asAS2, FTP, and SFTP and provide resolutions.
Perform post release checks and monitoring of the EDI data flow in and out of the system.
Communicate with all necessary stakeholders both local and overseas to ensure proper resolution and closure of issues.
Qualification

• Should have a bachelor’s degree in a relevant field and 2-4 years of enterprise production support experience that includes troubleshooting of EDI/EDIFACT/XML data.

• Good communication and interpersonal skills.

• Sound working knowledge of EDI, EDIFACT and XML.

• Good working knowledge of connectivity protocols such as AS2, SFTP, FTP etc. and their troubleshooting.

• Knowledge of supply chain, trade operations or trade sales, accounting, industry practices (LCs, banking, credit), and import and export practices will be a plus.

• Should be willing to learn/adapt to new technology, ability to work independently and as a team player.

• Strong issue resolution and conflict resolution skills.

Willing to work on weekends and public/mercantile holidays on a roster basis.

CONVERSATION TITLE: Online MBA in Canada - No Bachelor's Required
CONTENT:
Hi Indeewara, 


Did you know that you don’t need to be a university graduate to be eligible for an MBA? In fact, 48% of our Canadian graduates did not have a degree prior to getting their MBA.* 


This is because at the Australian Institute of Business (AIB), we believe that real-world management experience is as important as a formal qualification. And when we say real world management experience, we mean managing people. Or managing your own business. Or managing someone else’s business. They all count towards your MBA eligibility. 


Since 2014, over 2,000 Canadian students and alumni have trusted AIB with their MBA education. Here’s what drew them into our MBA program:  


✅ Flexible around you – Study 100% online, while you work. Fit your MBA into your life, not the other way around. 

✅ Value-for-money – AIB offers some of the best value-for-money MBAs in Canada, with monthly payment plans to make it even more accessible. 

✅ Accredited by the Canadian Institute of Management (CIM) and registered with CanLearn as an International Designated Educational Institution. We’re also internationally recognized and proud members of the Canadian Chamber of Commerce. 

✅ No GMAT required – Skip the stress and save time, money, and energy. 

✅ Graduate in as little as 2 years part time** – Choose the accelerated path and graduate in just 12 months, or study part-time and earn your MBA in 2 years.** 

✅ No exams – Our MBA is built on work-based assessments – we're about practice. You’ll build real skills by applying what you learn directly in your workplace. 


At AIB we can help you get the most out of your management experience, so you can take your career to a whole new level. 


⬇️ Ready to take the next step? Start your AIB MBA journey from Canada today — get the brochure now.

CONVERSATION TITLE: Support patients living with serious illness and grief
CONTENT:
A palliative approach to care can benefit your patients living with serious illness, from diagnosis and even alongside treatments aimed at a cure.


When introduced early, it helps patients and those closest to them manage illness with care that reflects their values, goals and beliefs. It also offers emotional, social, spiritual, and psychological support to those experiencing grief.


Conversations about serious illness aren’t always easy, but they are important. And they don’t have to start with a specialist. They can start with you.


By initiating early conversations, offering emotional and practical support, and coordinated care, you can help patients feel more prepared and supported through their journey.


We’ve created resources to help, including “3 Questions to ask yourself that make difficult conversations about serious illness easier.”


Click the button below to access this guide and other tools that help health and social service providers deliver a palliative approach to care.

CONVERSATION TITLE: Online MBA in Canada - No Bachelor's Required
CONTENT:
Hi Indeewara, 


Did you know that you don’t need to be a university graduate to be eligible for an MBA? In fact, 48% of our Canadian graduates did not have a degree prior to getting their MBA.* 


This is because at the Australian Institute of Business (AIB), we believe that real-world management experience is as important as a formal qualification. And when we say real world management experience, we mean managing people. Or managing your own business. Or managing someone else’s business. They all count towards your MBA eligibility. 


Since 2014, over 2,000 Canadian students and alumni have trusted AIB with their MBA education. Here’s what drew them into our MBA program:  


✅ Flexible around you – Study 100% online, while you work. Fit your MBA into your life, not the other way around. 

✅ Value-for-money – AIB offers some of the best value-for-money MBAs in Canada, with monthly payment plans to make it even more accessible. 

✅ Accredited by the Canadian Institute of Management (CIM) and registered with CanLearn as an International Designated Educational Institution. We’re also internationally recognized and proud members of the Canadian Chamber of Commerce. 

✅ No GMAT required – Skip the stress and save time, money, and energy. 

✅ Graduate in as little as 2 years part time** – Choose the accelerated path and graduate in just 12 months, or study part-time and earn your MBA in 2 years.** 

✅ No exams – Our MBA is built on work-based assessments – we're about practice. You’ll build real skills by applying what you learn directly in your workplace. 


At AIB we can help you get the most out of your management experience, so you can take your career to a whole new level. 


⬇️ Ready to take the next step? Start your AIB MBA journey from Canada today — get the brochure now.

CONVERSATION TITLE: Build & Deploy AI & Data Apps Faster with Snowflake

CONTENT:
Dear Indeewara,

 

Study at GISMA Business School in Berlin, and gain a Master’s degree from The University of Law, a British university with over 100 years of experience.

 

Choose a Master’s in Corporate Financial Management, Leadership and Human Resources, International Marketing, or Strategic Business Management.

Non-EU students who study in Germany for at least 6 months are also eligible for an 18-month post-study visa, giving you the opportunity to live and work in Europe’s largest economy.

 

Explore our postgraduate programmes, all taught 100% in English, and let us help you achieve your career ambitions.


Kind regards,

Pallavi Sharma
